message.minecad.sketch_tool.no_plane: Set a sketch plane with the Plane tool first.
message.minecad.sketch_tool.axis_mismatc: Vertex must use the same %s coordinate: %s.
message.minecad.sketch_tool.raycast_miss: No active sketch plane under the cursor.
message.minecad.extrude_tool.no_object: Click inside a closed sketch object to extrude.
message.minecad.extrude_tool.selected: Sketch object selected. Click a parallel face to set extrusion depth.
message.minecad.extrude_tool.changed_pla: Extrude selection cleared because the active plane changed.
message.minecad.extrude_tool.axis_mismat: Extrusion depth must use a face perpendicular to %s.
message.minecad.extrude_tool.no_tool: Hold the Extrude Tool to use /extrude.
message.minecad.extrude_tool.no_selectio: Select a sketch object with the Extrude Tool first.
message.minecad.extrude_tool.no_depth: Click a parallel face with the Extrude Tool to set depth first.
message.minecad.select_tool.no_body: No MineCad body found at that block.
tooltip.minecad.plane: Click a block face to set the sketch plane.
tooltip.minecad.sketch_tool: Click the active sketch plane to add polygon vertices.
tooltip.minecad.box_tool: Click two corners on the active sketch plane.
tooltip.minecad.circle_tool: Click center, then radius on the active sketch plane.
tooltip.minecad.extrude_tool: Click a sketch object, click depth, then type /extrude [operation] [block].
tooltip.minecad.select_tool: Click a body block to highlight the whole body.
